name: Holiday Quiche
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare a favorite pie shell.
2. Cook the bacon until crispy, then chop into pieces.
3. Sauté the chopped bacon with diced onions in a pan over medium heat until the onions are translucent and soft.
4. In a large bowl, whisk together the eggs, skim milk, savory, dried parsley, chervil, salt, and pepper until well combined.
5. Add the cooked bacon, ham, shredded lettuce, Swiss cheese, and remaining onion to the egg mixture. Stir gently to combine all ingredients evenly.
6. Pour the mixture into the prepared pie shell that has been partially baked.
7. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 25 minutes, or until set and lightly golden on top.
